title: rustling - move_semantics
snippet: move_semantics 1вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics1.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0596]: cannot borrow `vec1` as mutable, as it is not declared as mutable --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics1.rs:13:5 |9 | let vec1 = fill_vec(vec0); | ---- help: consider changing this to be mutable: `mut vec1`...13 | vec1.push(88); | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ cannot borrow as mutableerror: aborting due to previous errormutable л¬ём ңлӢӨ. mutл§Ң м¶”к°Җн•ҙмЈјл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ. м•„л§Ҳ vecк°Җ н•ЁмҲҳлЎң м „лӢ¬лҗҳлҠ” мҳҲмӢңлҘј ліҙм—¬мЈјкё° мң„н•ҙ л„ЈмқҖ л¬ём ңк°ҷлӢӨ.Solution// move_semantics1.rs// Make me compile! Execute `rustlings hint move_semantics1` for hints :)fn main() { let vec0 = Vec::new(); let mut vec1 = fill_vec(vec0); println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec1", vec1.len(), vec1); vec1.push(88); println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec1", vec1.len(), vec1);}fn fill_vec(vec: Vec<i32>) -> Vec<i32> { let mut vec = vec; vec.push(22); vec.push(44); vec.push(66); vec}move_semantics 2вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics2.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0382]: borrow of moved value: `vec0` --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics2.rs:13:57 |8 | let vec0 = Vec::new(); | ---- move occurs because `vec0` has type `Vec<i32>`, which does not implement the `Copy` trait9 |10 | let mut vec1 = fill_vec(vec0); | ---- value moved here...13 | println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec0", vec0.len(), vec0); | ^^^^^^^^^^ value borrowed here after moveerror: aborting due to previous errorм•„к№Ң л¬ём ңмҷҖ л№„мҠ·н•ҳм§Җл§Ң, vec1мқ„ л§Ңл“  мқҙнӣ„м—җ vec0мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ. vec0мқҖ н•ЁмҲҳ нҳём¶ңлЎң мқён•ҙ мқҙлҸҷн–Ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ main н•ЁмҲҳм—җм„ңлҠ” мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ м—ҶлӢӨ. vec0мқҳ ліөмӮ¬ліёмқ„ м „лӢ¬н•ҳлҠ” кІғмңјлЎң н•ҙкІ°н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.Solution// move_semantics2.rs// Make me compile without changing line 13 or moving line 10!// Execute `rustlings hint move_semantics2` for hints :)fn main() { let vec0 = Vec::new(); let mut vec1 = fill_vec(vec0.clone()); // Do not change the following line! println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec0", vec0.len(), vec0); vec1.push(88); println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec1", vec1.len(), vec1);}fn fill_vec(vec: Vec<i32>) -> Vec<i32> { let mut vec = vec; vec.push(22); vec.push(44); vec.push(66); vec}move_semantics 3вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics3.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0596]: cannot borrow `vec` as mutable, as it is not declared as mutable --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics3.rs:21:5 |20 | fn fill_vec(vec: Vec<i32>) -> Vec<i32> { | --- help: consider changing this to be mutable: `mut vec`21 | vec.push(22); | ^^^^^^^^^^^^ cannot borrow as mutableerror[E0596]: cannot borrow `vec` as mutable, as it is not declared as mutable --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics3.rs:22:5 |20 | fn fill_vec(vec: Vec<i32>) -> Vec<i32> { | --- help: consider changing this to be mutable: `mut vec`21 | vec.push(22);22 | vec.push(44); | ^^^^^^^^^^^^ cannot borrow as mutableerror[E0596]: cannot borrow `vec` as mutable, as it is not declared as mutable --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics3.rs:23:5 |20 | fn fill_vec(vec: Vec<i32>) -> Vec<i32> { | --- help: consider changing this to be mutable: `mut vec`...23 | vec.push(66); | ^^^^^^^^^^^^ cannot borrow as mutableerror: aborting due to 3 previous errors1лІҲкіј к°ҷмқҖ mutable л¬ём ңлӢӨ. mutл§Ң м¶”к°Җн•ҙмЈјл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.Solution// move_semantics3.rs// Make me compile without adding new lines-- just changing existing lines!// (no lines with multiple semicolons necessary!)// Execute `rustlings hint move_semantics3` for hints :)fn main() { let vec0 = Vec::new(); let mut vec1 = fill_vec(vec0); println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec1", vec1.len(), vec1); vec1.push(88); println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec1", vec1.len(), vec1);}fn fill_vec(mut vec: Vec<i32>) -> Vec<i32> { vec.push(22); vec.push(44); vec.push(66); vec}move_semantics 4вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics4.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0423]: expected value, found macro `vec` --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics4.rs:23:19 |23 | let mut vec = vec; | ^^^ not a valueerror[E0061]: this function takes 0 arguments but 1 argument was supplied --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics4.rs:12:20 |12 | let mut vec1 = fill_vec(vec0); | ^^^^^^^^ ---- supplied 1 argument | | | expected 0 arguments |note: function defined here --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics4.rs:22:4 |22 | fn fill_vec() -> Vec<i32> { | ^^^^^^^^error: aborting due to 2 previous errorsл¶Ҳн•„мҡ”н•ң vec0мқҖ м—Ҷм• кі , fill_vec н•ЁмҲҳм—җм„ң лІЎн„°лҘј л§Ңл“Өм–ҙм„ң м „лӢ¬л°ӣмңјл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.Solution// move_semantics4.rs// Refactor this code so that instead of having `vec0` and creating the vector// in `fn main`, we create it within `fn fill_vec` and transfer the// freshly created vector from fill_vec to its caller.// Execute `rustlings hint move_semantics4` for hints!fn main() { let mut vec1 = fill_vec(); println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec1", vec1.len(), vec1); vec1.push(88); println!("{} has length {} content `{:?}`", "vec1", vec1.len(), vec1);}// `fill_vec()` no longer takes `vec: Vec<i32>` as argumentfn fill_vec() -> Vec<i32> { let mut vec = Vec::new(); vec.push(22); vec.push(44); vec.push(66); vec}move_semantics 5вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics5.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0499]: cannot borrow `x` as mutable more than once at a time --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics5.rs:11:13 |10 | let y = &mut x; | ------ first mutable borrow occurs here11 | let z = &mut x; | ^^^^^^ second mutable borrow occurs here12 | *y += 100; | --------- first borrow later used hereerror: aborting due to previous errormutable borrowлҠ” н•ң лІҲм—җ н•ҳлӮҳл§Ң мһҲм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.Solution// move_semantics5.rs// Make me compile only by reordering the lines in `main()`, but without// adding, changing or removing any of them.// Execute `rustlings hint move_semantics5` for hints :)fn main() { let mut x = 100; let y = &mut x; *y += 100; let z = &mut x; *z += 1000; assert_eq!(x, 1200);}move_semantics 6вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics6.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0382]: borrow of moved value: `data` --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics6.rs:12:22 |8 | let data = "Rust is great!".to_string(); | ---- move occurs because `data` has type `String`, which does not implement the `Copy` trait9 |10 | get_char(data); | ---- value moved here11 |12 | string_uppercase(&data); | ^^^^^ value borrowed here after moveerror[E0716]: temporary value dropped while borrowed --> exercises/move_semantics/move_semantics6.rs:22:13 |21 | fn string_uppercase(mut data: &String) { | - let's call the lifetime of this reference `'1`22 | data = &data.to_uppercase(); | --------^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^- temporary value is freed at the end of this statement | | | | | creates a temporary which is freed while still in use | assignment requires that borrow lasts for `'1`error: aborting due to 2 previous errorsreferenceл§Ң м¶”к°Җ/мӮӯм ңн•ҙм„ң н’Җм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. get_charлҠ” мҶҢмң к¶Ңмқ„ к°Җм§Җм§Җ л§җкі  string_uppercaseм—җкІҗ мҶҢмң к¶Ңмқ„ мӨҳм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. м „мһҗлҠ” referenceлҘј мЈјкі , нӣ„мһҗлҠ” valueлҘј мЈјкІҢлҒ” н•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.Solution// move_semantics6.rs// Make me compile! `rustlings hint move_semantics6` for hints// You can't change anything except adding or removing referencesfn main() { let data = "Rust is great!".to_string(); get_char(&data); string_uppercase(data);}// Should not take ownershipfn get_char(data: &String) -> char { data.chars().last().unwrap()}// Should take ownershipfn string_uppercase(mut data: String) { data = data.to_uppercase(); println!("{}", data);}Summaryc++м—җм„ң лЁёлҰ¬лҘј н„°лңЁлҰ¬лҠ” мЈјлІ” мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳк°Җ moveмҷҖ copyлҘј нҡЁмңЁм ҒмңјлЎң м“°лҠ” лІ•мқёлҚ°, Rustм—җм„  нҡЁмңЁм Ғмқё мҪ”л“ңлҘј мүҪкІҢ мһ‘м„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

title: rustling - quiz 1
snippet: quiz 1// Mary is buying apples. One apple usually costs 2 Rustbucks, but if you buy// more than 40 at once, each apple only costs 1! Write a function that calculates// the price of an order of apples given the quantity bought. No hints this time!мң„м—җм„ң мҡ”кө¬н•ңлҢҖлЎң мӮ¬кіј к°ңмҲҳм—җ л”°лҘё к°ҖкІ©мқ„ лҰ¬н„ҙн•ҙмЈјлҠ” н•ЁмҲҳ fn calculate_apple_priceлҘј л§Ңл“Өл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ. л°ұмӨҖ лёҢлЎ мҰҲ 5кёүмқҳ лӮңмқҙлҸ„ л¬ём ңлӢӨ.Solutionfn calculate_apple_price(apple: i32) -> i32 { if apple > 40 { apple } else { apple * 2 }}#[test]fn verify_test() { let price1 = calculate_apple_price(35); let price2 = calculate_apple_price(40); let price3 = calculate_apple_price(65); assert_eq!(70, price1); assert_eq!(80, price2); assert_eq!(65, price3);}SummaryмІҳмқҢ м–ём–ҙлҘј л°°мҡё л•Ң л°°мҡ°лҠ” к°ҖмһҘ кё°мҙҲм Ғмқё лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ м§ҖкёҲк№Ңм§Җ лӢӨлӨҳлӢӨ. лӢӨмқҢл¶Җн„°лҠ” мўҖ лҚ” мӢ¬мҳӨн•ң лӮҙмҡ©мқҳ нҖҙмҰҲк°Җ лӮҳмҳӨкёё л°”лһҖлӢӨ.

title: rustling - if
snippet: if 1// if1.rs// I AM NOT DONEpub fn bigger(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { // Complete this function to return the bigger number! // Do not use: // - another function call // - additional variables // Execute `rustlings hint if1` for hints}// Don't mind this for now :)#[cfg(test)]mod tests { use super::*; #[test] fn ten_is_bigger_than_eight() { assert_eq!(10, bigger(10, 8)); } #[test] fn fortytwo_is_bigger_than_thirtytwo() { assert_eq!(42, bigger(32, 42)); }}std::maxмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кё°лҠҘмқ„ н•ҳлҠ” н•ЁмҲҳлҘј л§Ңл“Өм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.Solutionpub fn bigger(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { if a > b { a } else { b }}if 2// if2.rs// Step 1: Make me compile!// Step 2: Get the bar_for_fuzz and default_to_baz tests passing!// Execute the command `rustlings hint if2` if you want a hint :)// I AM NOT DONEpub fn fizz_if_foo(fizzish: &str) -> &str { if fizzish == "fizz" { "foo" } else { 1 }}// No test changes needed!#[cfg(test)]mod tests { use super::*; #[test] fn foo_for_fizz() { assert_eq!(fizz_if_foo("fizz"), "foo") } #[test] fn bar_for_fuzz() { assert_eq!(fizz_if_foo("fuzz"), "bar") } #[test] fn default_to_baz() { assert_eq!(fizz_if_foo("literally anything"), "baz") }}fizz -> foo, fuzz -> bar, _ -> bazлҘј лҰ¬н„ҙн•ҙмЈјлҠ” н•ЁмҲҳлҘј л§Ңл“Өл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.Solutionpub fn fizz_if_foo(fizzish: &str) -> &str { if fizzish == "fizz" { "foo" } else if fizzish == "fuzz" { "bar" } else { "baz" }}# Summaryмқҙм ңлҠ” лӢЁмҲңн•ң м»ҙнҢҢмқј м—җлҹ¬лҘј кі м№ҳлҠ” л¬ём ңк°Җ м•„лӢҢ, мҡ”кө¬мӮ¬н•ӯм—җ л§һлҠ” мҪ”л“ңлҘј мһ‘м„ұн•ҳлҠ” л¬ём ңк°Җ лӮҳмҳЁлӢӨ.

title: rustling - functions
snippet: functions 1вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/functions/functions1.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0425]: cannot find function `call_me` in this scope --> exercises/functions/functions1.rs:7:5 |7 | call_me(); | ^^^^^^^ not found in this scopeerror: aborting due to previous errorcall_meлһҖ н•ЁмҲҳк°Җ м—ҶлӢӨкі  н•ңлӢӨ. м•„л¬ҙ кё°лҠҘмқ„ к°–лҠ” н•ЁмҲҳлҘј н•ҳлӮҳ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙмЈјмһҗ.Solutionfn call_me() {}fn main() { call_me();}functions 2вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/functions/functions2.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error: expected type, found `)` --> exercises/functions/functions2.rs:10:16 |10 | fn call_me(num:) { | ^ expected typeerror[E0425]: cannot find value `num` in this scope --> exercises/functions/functions2.rs:11:17 |11 | for i in 0..num { | ^^^ not found in this scopeerror: aborting due to 2 previous errorsnumмқҳ нғҖмһ…мқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ҳлӢӨкі  л§җн•ңлӢӨ. mainм—җм„ң нҳём¶ңн•  л•Ң call_me(3)мңјлЎң нҳём¶ңн•ҳлҜҖлЎң, numм—җкІҢ integer нғҖмһ… м•„л¬ҙкұ°лӮҳ л„Јм–ҙмЈјмһҗ.Solutionfn main() { call_me(3);}fn call_me(num: i32) { for i in 0..num { println!("Ring! Call number {}", i + 1); }}functions 3вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/functions/functions3.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0061]: this function takes 1 argument but 0 arguments were supplied --> exercises/functions/functions3.rs:7:5 |7 | call_me(); | ^^^^^^^-- supplied 0 arguments | | | expected 1 argument |note: function defined here --> exercises/functions/functions3.rs:10:4 |10 | fn call_me(num: u32) { | ^^^^^^^ --------error: aborting due to previous errorмқёмһҗ м—Ҷмқҙ нҳём¶ңн–ҲлӢӨкі  н•ңлӢӨ. м Ғм Ҳн•ң к°’мқ„ л„Јм–ҙмЈјмһҗ.Solutionfn main() { call_me(0);}fn call_me(num: u32) { for i in 0..num { println!("Ring! Call number {}", i + 1); }}functions 4вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/functions/functions4.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error: expected type, found `{` --> exercises/functions/functions4.rs:14:30 |14 | fn sale_price(price: i32) -> { | ^ expected typeerror: aborting due to previous errorлҰ¬н„ҙ нғҖмһ…мқ„ л„Јм–ҙмЈјмһҗ. (л„Ҳл¬ҙ мү¬мӣҢм„ң мҠ¬мҠ¬ м§ҲлҰ°лӢӨ)Solutionfn main() { let original_price = 51; println!("Your sale price is {}", sale_price(original_price));}fn sale_price(price: i32) -> i32 { if is_even(price) { price - 10 } else { price - 3 }}fn is_even(num: i32) -> bool { num % 2 == 0}functions 5вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/functions/functions5.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0308]: mismatched types --> exercises/functions/functions5.rs:11:24 |11 | fn square(num: i32) -> i32 { | ------ ^^^ expected `i32`, found `()` | | | implicitly returns `()` as its body has no tail or `return` expression12 | num * num; | - help: remove this semicolonerror: aborting due to previous errorм•„л¬ҙ к°’лҸ„ лҰ¬н„ҙн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  мһҲлӢӨ. return num * num;лқјкі  н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ м„ёлҜёмҪңлЎ мқ„ л№јкі  num * numмңјлЎң кі м№ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.Solutionfn main() { let answer = square(3); println!("The answer is {}", answer);}fn square(num: i32) -> i32 { num * num}Summaryкё°мҙҲм Ғмқё н•ЁмҲҳ мӮ¬мҡ©лІ•мқ„ м•Ңм•„лҙӨлӢӨ. мҠ¬мҠ¬ м§ҲлҰ°лӢӨ.

title: Xfceм—җм„ң мқјл¶Җ м•ұмқҙ freezeлҗҳлҠ” нҳ„мғҒ
snippet: л¬ём ңлӮҳлҠ” EndeavourOS + Xfce + i3-gaps мЎ°н•©мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ© мӨ‘мқҙлӢӨ. м •л§җ мўӢмқҖ мЎ°н•©мқҙм§Җл§Ң лӮҳлҘј кұ°мҠ¬лҰ¬кІҢ л§Ңл“ңлҠ” л¬ём ңк°Җ мһҲлҠ”лҚ°, нҠ№м • м•ұмқҙ мһҗкҫё freezeлҗҳлҠ” кІғмқҙлӢӨ.м•ұмқ„ нӮӨкі  лӢӨлҘё мқјмқ„ н•ҳлӢӨк°Җ (лӢӨлҘё workspaceм—җм„ң мһ‘м—…н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ, к°ҷмқҖ workspaceм§Җл§Ң focusлҠ” лӢӨлҘё м•ұм—җ мһҲмқ„ л•Ң) лҸҢм•„к°Җліҙл©ҙ к·ёлғҘ м• к°Җ лЁ№нҶөмқҙ лҗңлӢӨ. нҷ”л©ҙм—җ м•ұмқҙ лӮҳмҳӨм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ. к·ё мһҗлҰ¬м—җлҠ” л’Өм—җ л№„м№ҳлҠ” л°”нғ•нҷ”л©ҙкіј i3к°Җ н‘ңмӢңн•ҙмЈјлҠ” н…Ңл‘җлҰ¬м„ л§Ң мһҲмқ„ лҝҗмқҙлӢӨ.мІҳмқҢ л¬ём ңлҘј мқјмңјнӮЁ м•ұмқҖ AlacrittyлӢӨ. мқҙм „м—җ Arch + Xfce + XmonadлҘј мҚјмқ„ лӢ№мӢңм—җлҸ„ Alacrittyк°Җ к°ҷмқҖ л¬ём ңлҘј мқјмңјмј°лҠ”лҚ°, GitHub IssueлҘј ліҙкі  н•ҙкІ°н–ҲлӢӨ. к·ёлҹ°лҚ° н•ҙлӢ№ GitHub IssueлҘј лӢӨмӢң м°ҫмқ„ мҲҳк°Җ м—Ҷм—Ҳкі , к·ёлғҘ Xfce-terminalлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°лЎң н–ҲлӢӨ.лӢӨмқҢмңјлЎң л¬ём ңлҘј мқјмңјнӮЁ м•ұмқҖ DiscordлӢӨ. ArchWikiм—җм„ң л№„мҠ·н•ң л¬ём ңмқҳ н•ҙкІ°лІ•мқ„ м°ҫмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”лҚ° Discord - ArchWiki мӢңлҸ„лҠ” н•ҙліҙм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳлӢӨ.AlacrittyлҠ” лҢҖмІҙ н„°лҜёл„җмқҙ л„җл ёкі , DiscordлҠ” мһҗмЈј м“°м§Җ м•Ҡм•„м„ң к·ёлғҘ л¶ҲнҺён•ҳкІҢ л¬ём ңлҘј м•Ҳкі  к°Җкё°лЎң н–ҲлӢӨ.н•ҙкІ°мөңк·јм—җ м•„мЈј л©Ӣм§„ л§ҲнҒ¬лӢӨмҡҙ нҺём§‘кё°лҘј м°ҫм•ҳлӢӨ. MarkTextмқҙ кёҖлҸ„ н•ҙлӢ№ нҺём§‘кё°лЎң мһ‘м„ұ мӨ‘мқҙлӢӨ.к·ёлҹ°лҚ° мқҙ м•ұм—җм„ңлҸ„ м•һм„ң л§җн•ң freeze л¬ём ңк°Җ л°ңмғқн–ҲлӢӨ. мҳӨлһңл§Ңм—җ л°ңкІ¬н•ң л©ӢмһҲлҠ” нҺём§‘кё°мқҙкё°м—җ AlacrittyмІҳлҹј лІ„лҰ¬кё° м•„к№қлӢӨкі  мғқк°Ғн–Ҳкі , л¬ём ңлҘј н•ҙкІ°н•ҳкё°лЎң н–ҲлӢӨ.GitHub Issueм—җм„ң 1м°Ём ҒмңјлЎң м •ліҙлҘј м°ҫлҠ” лҚ°лҠ” мӢӨнҢЁн–ҲлӢӨ. мІ« нҺҳмқҙм§Җл¶Җн„° мӨ‘көӯм–ҙлЎң лҗң кёҖмқҙ л§Һмқҙ ліҙм—¬м„ң лӘҮ к°ң нӣ‘лӢӨк°Җ лҸ„л§қміӨлӢӨвҖҰMarkTextлҸ„ DiscordмІҳлҹј Electronкё°л°ҳмқё кІғмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҳкі  Electron л¬ём ңмқј мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲкІ лӢӨлҠ” мғқк°Ғмқҙ л“Өм—ҲлӢӨ. к·ёлһҳм„ң Electron + i3лЎң мқҙкІғм ҖкІғ кІҖмғүмқ„ н•ҳлӢӨк°Җ (мқҙл•Ңк№Ңм§Җ л¬ём ңк°Җ i3м—җ мһҲлӢӨкі  мғқк°Ғн–ҲлӢӨ) н•ҙкІ°лІ•мқ„ Electron Issueм—җм„ң м°ҫм•ҳлӢӨ.Electron apps freeze on linux 5.x kernel В· Issue #21415 В· electron/electron В· GitHubм—…лҚ°мқҙнҠёлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  мҳӨлһ«лҸҷм•Ҳ л°©м№ҳлҗң мқён…” к·ёлһҳн”Ҫм№ҙл“ң л“ңлқјмқҙлІ„мҷҖ лӯ”к°Җ м¶©лҸҢмқҙ мһҲлӢӨкі  н•ңлӢӨ. лӢЁмҲңнһҲ xfce-video-intelлҘј мӮӯм ңн–ҲлҚ”лӢҲ л¬ём ңк°Җ н•ҙкІ°лҗҗлӢӨ.м¶©лҸҢл©Җм©Ўн•ң нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ н•ҳлӮҳлҘј лӮ л ёмңјлӢҲ xfce-video-intelлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” лӢӨлҘё кіім—җм„ң л¬ём ңк°Җ мғқкёё мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. м§ҖкёҲк№Ңм§Җ нҷ•мқёлҗң л¬ём ңлҠ” xbacklightн•ҳлӮҳ лҝҗмқҙлӢҲ лӢӨн–үмқҙлқјкі  н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.xbacklightмһҳ лҗҳлҚҳ м• к°Җ к°‘мһҗкё° мЎ°м Ҳмқҙ м•Ҳ лҗңлӢӨ.xbacklight +5лһҖ лӢЁмҲңн•ң л°қкё° мҰқк°Җ лӘ…л №м—җ No outputs have backlight propertyлһҖ лҢҖлӢөмқҙ лҸҢм•„мҳЁлӢӨ. ArchWikiм—җ кҙҖл Ё кёҖмқҙ мһҲлӢӨ.Backlight - ArchWikiacpilightлҘј м„Өм№ҳн•ҙм„ң кё°мЎҙмқҳ xbacklightлҘј лҢҖмІҙн•ҳкІҢ н•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.м•„м§ҒлҸ„ л¬ём ңлҠ” лӮЁм•ҳлҠ”лҚ°, мғҲлЎңмҡҙ xbacklightлҠ” sudo к¶Ңн•ңмқ„ мӨҳм•јл§Ң мӢӨн–үлҗңлӢӨ. мҰү, sudo xbacklight +5лқјкі  н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. н„°лҜёл„җм—җм„ң м“ё лӘ…л №лҸ„ м•„лӢҲкі , keybindingмңјлЎң м“ё лӘ…л №мқҙлҜҖлЎң мқҙкІғлҸ„ н•ҙкІ°н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ./usr/bin/xbacklight: [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/sys/class/backlight/intel_backlight/brightness'к¶Ңн•ң л¬ём ңлҘј мқјмңјнӮЁ нҢҢмқјлЎң к°ҖлҙӨлӢӨ. н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјм—” othersм—җкІҢ write к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ м—ҶлӢӨ..rw-rw-r-- 4.1k root 8 Jul 21:11 brightnesschmod o+w brightnessлЎң к¶Ңн•ңл§Ң м¶”к°Җн•ҳлӢҲ н•ҙкІ°лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ.н•ҙкІ°лҗң мӨ„ м•Ңм•ҳлҠ”лҚ° мһ¬л¶ҖнҢ… нӣ„м—җлҠ” лӢӨмӢң sudo л¬ём ңк°Җ мғқкІјлӢӨ.м Җ brightness нҢҢмқјмқҖ м•„л§Ҳ лЎңк·ёмқё лҳҗлҠ” л¶ҖнҢ…н•ҳл©ҙ мғқкё°лҠ” кІғ к°ҷлӢӨ. к¶Ңн•ңмқ„ л°”кҝ”лҙӨмһҗ мқҙлІҲ м„ём…ҳм—җл§Ң м Ғмҡ©лҗҳлҜҖлЎң к·јліём Ғмқё н•ҙкІ°лІ•мқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ҳлӢӨ./usr/bin/xbacklight: [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/sys/class/backlight/intel_backlight/brightness'мқҙ лӘ…л №м–ҙлЎң кІҖмғүмқ„ н•ҙліҙлӢҲ л°”лЎң н•ҙкІ°лІ•мқ„ м°ҫмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ. backlight/brightness' (#16) В· Issuesліёмқёмқ„ video к·ёлЈ№м—җ м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.sudo usermod -a -G video paliloл¬ём ңк°Җ м •л§җ н•ҙкІ°лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ.SummaryмӣҗмқёлҸ„ лӘЁлҘҙкі  л°©м№ҳн–ҲлҚҳ л¬ём ңк°Җ н•ҙкІ°лҗҳм–ҙ кё°л¶„мқҙ мўӢлӢӨ. AlacrittyмҷҖ Discordк°Җ л¬ём ңм—җм„ң н•ҙл°©лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ. лҚ•л¶„м—җ Xfce-terminalмқҖ лӢӨмӢң кө¬м„қм—җ л°•нһҲкІҢ лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ.м—ӯмӢң IntelмқҖ лҸ„мӣҖмқҙ лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

title: rustling - variables
snippet: variables 1вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/variables/variables1.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0425]: cannot find value `x` in this scope --> exercises/variables/variables1.rs:8:5 |8 | x = 5; | ^ not found in this scopeerror[E0425]: cannot find value `x` in this scope --> exercises/variables/variables1.rs:9:36 |9 | println!("x has the value {}", x); | ^ not found in this scopeerror: aborting due to 2 previous errorsл‘җ м—җлҹ¬ лӘЁл‘җ cannot find value 'x'лқјкі  н•ңлӢӨ. xлһҖ ліҖмҲҳлҘј л§Ңл“Өм§ҖлҸ„ м•Ҡкі  лҢҖмһ…кіј м¶ңл Ҙмқ„ н•ҳкі  мһҲлӢӨ. мІҳмқҢм—җ xлҘј м„ м–ён•Ёкіј лҸҷмӢңм—җ 5лЎң мҙҲкё°нҷ”н•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.Solutionfn main() { let x = 5; println!("x has the value {}", x);}variables 2вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/variables/variables2.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0282]: type annotations needed --> exercises/variables/variables2.rs:7:9 |7 | let x; | ^ consider giving `x` a typeerror: aborting due to previous errorxмқҳ нғҖмһ…мқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ҳлӢӨкі  л§җн•ңлӢӨ. м•„лһ«мӨ„м—җм„ң xмҷҖ 10мқ„ л№„көҗн•ҳкі  мһҲмңјлҜҖлЎң xмқҳ нғҖмһ…мқҖ i32мқј кІғмқҙлӢӨ. let x: i32мІҳлҹј нғҖмһ…мқ„ м•Ңл ӨмЈјмһҗ.cppм—җм„ int x; std::cout << x;мІҳлҹј ліҖмҲҳ мҙҲкё°нҷ”лҘј н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„лҸ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲм§Җл§Ң (л¬јлЎ  м»ҙнҢҢмқјлҹ¬к°Җ кІҪкі н•  кІғмқҙлӢӨ), rustм—җм„  ліҖмҲҳлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл Өл©ҙ мҙҲкё°нҷ”лҘј л°ҳл“ңмӢң н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. к·ёлҰ¬кі  мҙҲкё°к°’мқ„ мЈјл©ҙ м»ҙнҢҢмқјлҹ¬лҠ” xмқҳ нғҖмһ…мқ„ м¶”лЎ н•  мҲҳ мһҲмңјлҜҖлЎң көімқҙ нғҖмһ…мқ„ м Ғм§Җ м•Ҡм•„лҸ„ лҗңлӢӨ.Solutionfn main() { let x = 0; if x == 10 { println!("Ten!"); } else { println!("Not ten!"); }}variables 3вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/variables/variables3.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0384]: cannot assign twice to immutable variable `x` --> exercises/variables/variables3.rs:9:5 |7 | let x = 3; | - | | | first assignment to `x` | help: consider making this binding mutable: `mut x`8 | println!("Number {}", x);9 | x = 5; // don't change this line | ^^^^^ cannot assign twice to immutable variableerror: aborting due to previous errorxк°Җ mutableн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖлҚ° к°’мқ„ ліҖкІҪн–ҲлӢӨкі  м•Ңл ӨмӨҖлӢӨ. м№ңм Ҳн•ҳкІҢ м–ҙл–»кІҢ л°”кҝ”м•ј н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ helpлЎң м•Ңл ӨмӨҖлӢӨ. к·ёлҢҖлЎң л”°лқјн•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.Solutionfn main() { let mut x = 3; println!("Number {}", x); x = 5; // don't change this line println!("Number {}", x);}variables 4вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/variables/variables4.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0381]: borrow of possibly-uninitialized variable: `x` --> exercises/variables/variables4.rs:8:27 |8 | println!("Number {}", x); | ^ use of possibly-uninitialized `x` | = note: this error originates in the macro `$crate::format_args_nl` (in Nightly builds, run with -Z macro-backtrace for more info)error: aborting due to previous errorмҙҲкё°нҷ”н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ ліҖмҲҳ xлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н–ҲлӢӨкі  н•ңлӢӨ. Variable 2м—җм„ңлҸ„ м•Ңм•„лҙӨл“Ҝ rustм—җм„  м„ м–ёкіј лҸҷмӢңм—җ ліҖмҲҳ мҙҲкё°нҷ”лҘј л¬ҙмЎ°кұҙ н•ҳлҠ” кІҢ нҺён•ҳлӢӨ.Solutionfn main() { let x = 0; println!("Number {}", x);}variables 5вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/variables/variables5.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error[E0308]: mismatched types --> exercises/variables/variables5.rs:9:14 |7 | let number = "T-H-R-E-E"; // don't change this line | ----------- expected due to this value8 | println!("Spell a Number : {}", number);9 | number = 3; | ^ expected `&str`, found integererror[E0369]: cannot add `{integer}` to `&str` --> exercises/variables/variables5.rs:10:48 |10 | println!("Number plus two is : {}", number + 2); | ------ ^ - {integer} | | | &strerror: aborting due to 2 previous errorsnumber нғҖмһ…мқҙ &strмқёлҚ° м—¬кё°м—җ 3мқ„ лҢҖмһ…н•ҳкі  мһҲлӢӨ. мӢ¬м§Җм–ҙ numberлҠ” mutableлҸ„ м•„лӢҲлӢӨ. ліҖмҲҳлҘј к°ҷмқҖ мқҙлҰ„мңјлЎң мғҲлЎң м„ м–ён•ҳлҠ” shadowing кё°лІ•мңјлЎң н•ҙкІ°н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.Solutionfn main() { let number = "T-H-R-E-E"; // don't change this line println!("Spell a Number : {}", number); let number = 3; println!("Number plus two is : {}", number + 2);}variables 6вҡ пёҸ Compilation of exercises/variables/variables6.rs failed!, Compiler error message:error: missing type for `const` item --> exercises/variables/variables6.rs:6:7 |6 | const NUMBER = 3; | ^^^^^^ help: provide a type for the constant: `NUMBER: i32`error: aborting due to previous errorconst ліҖмҲҳмқҳ кІҪмҡ° нғҖмһ…мқ„ л°ҳл“ңмӢң лӘ…мӢңн•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. help л©”мӢңм§ҖлЎң м№ңм ҲнһҲ м•ҲлӮҙлҸ„ н•ҙмӨҖлӢӨ.Solutionconst NUMBER: i32 = 3;fn main() { println!("Number {}", NUMBER);}Summaryкё°мҙҲм Ғмқё ліҖмҲҳ мӮ¬мҡ©лІ•мқ„ м•Ңм•„лҙӨлӢӨ. м•„м§Ғк№Ңм§ҖлҠ” м „нҳҖ м–ҙл Өмҡҙ м җмқҙ м—ҶлӢӨ.

title: rustling - intro
snippet: rustlingrustлҘј мһ¬л°ҢлҠ” нҖҙмҰҲмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ л°°мҡё мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” нҠңнҶ лҰ¬м–јмқҙлӢӨ. м—җлҹ¬к°Җ мһҲлҠ” rust мҪ”л“ңк°Җ мЈјм–ҙм§Җл©ҙ мҳ¬л°”лҘҙкІҢ кі міҗм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. м•„лһҳ л§ҒнҒ¬м—җм„ң м„Өм№ҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.GitHub - rust-lang/rustlingsrustupл§Ң мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ лӘ…л №м–ҙ н•ң мӨ„лЎң м„Өм№ҳк°Җ лҗңлӢӨ. лӮҳлҠ” rustлҘј arch repositoryм—җм„ң л°ӣм•ҳкё°м—җ rustupмқ„ л”°лЎң м„Өм№ҳн•ҙм•ј н–ҲлҠ”лҚ°вҖҰ rustк°Җ м„Өм№ҳлҗң мғҒнғңм—җм„  rustupмқ„ м„Өм№ҳ лӘ»н•ҳлҚ”лқјвҖҰ к·Җм°®кІҢ кё°мЎҙ rustлҘј м§Җмҡ°кі  м§„н–үн•ҙм•ј н–ҲлӢӨ.м„Өм№ҳлҗң rustling л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лЎң к°Җм„ң мҡ°лҰ¬к°Җ н’Җм–ҙм•ј н•  нҖҙмҰҲлҘј
